node.text: Caroline acknowledged the traumatic experience of Melanie's family being in an accident during the road trip.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "children handle accident") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.96)

node.text: Caroline used to go horseback riding with her dad when she was a kid.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "children handle accident") on Observation 4 (Score: 0.73)

node.text: Caroline took the first step towards becoming a mom by applying to adoption agencies.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "children handle accident") on Observation 1 (Score: 0.51)

node.text: Caroline's vision for the future includes creating a safe and loving home for needy kids to experience love and acceptance.
Caroline is looking into adoption and contacted her mentor for advice.
Caroline has a guinea pig named Oscar.
Caroline received invaluable help from friends, family, and role models during the process of finding acceptance.
Caroline sees adoption as a way to share her love and provide a safe, loving home for kids in need.
Caroline loves horses and has a love for them.
Caroline appreciates seeing Melanie's love for her family and acknowledges that they are her rock.
